composition.Programmer 2: Fix and complete all frontend HTML templates in the 'templates/' directory, including 'dashboard.html'. Ensure that all templates are correctly named, saved in the 'templates' folder at the root of the Flask project, and that all URLs in the frontend code are Flask routes, not direct HTML file names. Implement the specified page elements with correct IDs and types as per the requirements document. This task is critical to resolve the current 'jinja2.exceptions.TemplateNotFound  dashboard.html' error and to support user-friendly navigation and interaction with backend routes. Programmer 2 should coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure that the frontend templates correctly correspond to the backend routes implemented in 'app.py'.
